title: schone Christmas Tinsel Wall Plaque – Santa Design, 33cm with Hanging Loop
features: Santa Design – Features a festive Santa Claus design for a cheerful holiday look.
Tinsel Covering – Covered in bright tinsel for a sparkling effect.
Plastic Frame – Built on a sturdy plastic frame for durability.
Easy to Hang – Comes with a threaded loop for simple hanging on walls or doors.
description: Add a festive touch to your home with this Christmas tinsel wall plaque featuring a cheerful Santa design. Measuring 33cm in height, this holiday tinsel decoration is perfect for brightening up walls, doors, or windows. Made with a durable plastic frame and covered in sparkling tinsel, it creates a beautiful, eye-catching effect. The plaque includes a convenient threaded loop, making it easy to hang anywhere in your home. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, this Christmas wall decor brings holiday cheer to any space. A great choice for seasonal wall hanging and Christmas decorations for home.
